JSON.parse(raw) : {}; const response = handleAlice(body); res.writeHead(200, { "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" }); res.end(JSON.stringify(response)); } catch { res.writeHead(400, { "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" }); res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid JSON" })); } }); }); server.listen(PORT, () => { console.log(`Alice webhook is listening on port ${PORT}`); }); ``` Запуск
